3220330.name: Mangoo
3220330.description:
Mini game collection.
Existing games: shooting, ball rolling

Shooting
Collect props and destroy the enemies you see.
There will be 10 waves of enemies, and the number and health of enemies will increase each time.
Players collect props scattered on the map to enhance their own strength.
Props:
"Mango-white" increases the number of lives
"Amount-blue" increases the number of shots
"Power-red" increases attack power
"Speed-yellow" increases attack speed
Eliminate all enemies and win.

Ball rolling
Control the ball to jump on the platform and avoid obstacles to reach the destination.

Always free.
